signals.headline: Kevin Durant Cleared to Return for Lakers-Rockets Game 2 | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Kevin Durant Cleared to Return for Lakers-Rockets Game 2 | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Houston Rockets star Kevin Durant has been cleared to play in Game 2 against the Los Angeles Lakers on April 21, after missing Game 1 due to a knee tendon bruise, per Shams Charania reports from 38-41 minutes ago.[6] This breaking news could shift prediction markets toward Houston, as it pits Durant against LeBron
